evidence.scientific_clarity: All four panels are present and readable: method diagram (A), ablation bars (B), log-scale loss curves (C), and annotated 5×5 heatmap (D); the figure clearly carries the brief's scientific claim.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' set in rcParams; fonts resolve to Arial/ArialMT (CID TrueType, embedded, subsetted) — no DejaVu Sans fallback; panel labels bold 11pt sans-serif.
evidence.palette: Blue (#0F4D92) and orange (#D55E00) are used for signal/accent — CB-safe pair; neutral grey for baseline; green (#1A7A4A) adds a third categorical hue; no red/green directional misuse, but three-hue categorical scheme is borderline for some CB modes.
evidence.layout_density: gridspec(2,3, width_ratios=[2,1,1]) fills space well; bottom heatmap spans full width; bar/line panels are compact; minor wspace/hspace padding visible but not wasteful.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption numerical claim for panel C is self-contradictory ('final loss 0.36 vs. 0.19 lower than Baseline (0.36)' — the two quoted values are equal); legend in panel C is inside axes (upper right) which is acceptable; panel A legend strip at bottom uses unlabelled colour swatches for ablations that don't match panel B items.
evidence.vector_fidelity: figure.pdf is real vector (52 kB, Matplotlib PDF backend v3.10.9); pdffonts confirms Arial embedded as CID TrueType with Identity-H encoding; text is selectable; pdf.fonttype=42 confirmed in script.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, caption.tex, gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial; figure.svg also present as bonus; data.json is missing from the work directory (script reads it but it was not deposited alongside the figure outputs).
evidence.caption_quality: Caption describes all four panels and includes specific numerical findings (−6.5 pp ablation drop, 0.36 final loss); however the panel C loss statement is internally inconsistent ('0.36 vs 0.19 lower than Baseline (0.36)'), undermining the numerical claim's credibility.

overall_strengths: Full vector PDF with embedded Arial (pdf.fonttype=42), no DejaVu Sans fallback, and consistent sans-serif stack throughout all panels.
Compact, well-structured 4-panel layout matching the brief's gridspec exactly, with bold upper-left panel labels, data-range-zoomed axes, and annotated heatmap cells.
overall_weaknesses: Caption panel C numerical claim is self-contradictory (states final loss is 0.36 and also 0.19 lower than Baseline which is also 0.36), which would draw immediate Reviewer 2 scrutiny.

data.json is absent from the output directory, so the figure cannot be reproduced from the deposited artefacts; also the panel A bottom legend uses colour swatches for ablation variants that are inconsistent with panel B's item labels.
